name: Shadow Shaman
description: I am the intermediary between life and death.

abilities.name: Fowl Play
abilities.description: Applies Hex on himself, without the set movement speed component, whenever Shadow Shaman takes lethal damage. Prevents all incoming damage utilizing damage manipulation.

abilities.name: Ether Shock
abilities.description: Creates a cone of ethereal energy that strikes multiple enemy units.

abilities.name: Hex
abilities.description: Rhasta often ended performances by turning himself into a chicken - now, the humiliation is shared.

abilities.name: Shackles
abilities.description: Magically binds an enemy unit so that it cannot move or attack, dealing damage over time. Both the base damage and damage increase per interval are dealt in one single damage instance in the combat log.

abilities.name: Chicken Fingers
abilities.description: Applies Hex on the attacked enemy unit upon the Shaman's successful attack.

abilities.name: Mass Serpent Ward
abilities.description: Summons a number of Serpent Wards to attack enemy units and enemy buildings. Summons a single, massive Serpent Ward with various increased traits to attack enemy units and enemy buildings.
